unit.note: server vitest 158 files / 1871 tests green (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local). +24 vs pre-D03 (1847): the two new frozen guard files (author!=fixer, must-not-modify) — preview-session-manager.win32.test.ts (16: Guard 2a F03, Guard 2b F31, Guard 2c POSIX pin, Guard 1 injection fence x2 platforms x5 payloads) + preview-win32-resolve.test.ts (8: Guard 3 cwd-before-PATH, Guard 4 spaced-shim verbatim quoting, Guard 5 %-refusal, Guard 6 bare-absent throw). The win32 branch is process.platform-stubbed so the guards run AND pass on the Linux CI (case-sensitive fs handled via lowercase planted .cmd + PATHEXT='.cmd'). No client/src production change (all 5 changed files under server/src/core/).

integration.note: The two frozen guard files drive the REAL PreviewSessionManager + the REAL resolveSpawn()/tokenizeCommand() executable-resolution logic (real fs shim planting + real realpathSync.native), through the injected fake-spawn seam so no payload (calc/reboot/rm) ever executes. RED-first proven on this win32 host for Guard 2a (F03 bare npm not cmd.exe-wrapped), Guard 2b (F31 C:\tools\node.exe backslash mangled), Guard 3 (cwd-before-PATH hijack), Guard 4 (spaced Program Files shim), Guard 5 (%-refusal), Guard 6 (bare-absent cwd-fallback) — each RED->GREEN; Guard 1 injection fence + Guard 2c POSIX pin GREEN throughout.

e2e.note: No preview E2E run here. D03 is server-side spawn-command construction with NO UI-observable change (the Preview button already rendered pre-fix; the fix makes the shell:false spawn actually WORK on win32). The behavioral proof is the deterministic server guards. The spaced Program-Files cmd.exe-shim path is exercised only via stub because Node on this host lives at a SPACELESS WinGet path, so a host browser smoke cannot drive it. Real-stack proof deferred to the post-merge :3847 smoke (Guard 4: click Preview on the supabase-nextjs profile, confirm the dev server actually spawns).

surface_verification.justification: Server-side Preview dev-server spawn-command construction (FR-01.17); no UI-observable change — the Preview button already rendered pre-fix, the fix makes the shell:false spawn actually WORK on win32 (npm->cmd.exe wrapper, PATHEXT resolution, backslash-safe tokenization). Behavioral proof is the deterministic server guards (preview-session-manager.win32.test.ts + preview-win32-resolve.test.ts, 1871-test suite green on both this win32 host and the Linux CI via process.platform stubs). The spaced Program-Files cmd.exe-shim path is exercised only via stub because Node on this host lives at a SPACELESS WinGet path, so a host browser smoke cannot drive it. Post-merge :3847 smoke (Guard 4: click Preview on the supabase-nextjs profile, confirm the dev server spawns) is the real-stack proof. No client/** file changed; the frontend-change detector false-positived on the 'src/' substring inside 'server/src/'.

behaviors.behavior: AC1/F03 (HIGH) — on win32, dev_server.command 'npm run dev' is wrapped in cmd.exe /d /s /c with DISCRETE argv (['npm'(.cmd)?, 'run', 'dev']), shell:false; argv0 is the cmd.exe shim, never bare 'npm' (npm.cmd is EINVAL/ENOENT-blocked under shell:false by Node's CVE-2024-27980 hardening)
behaviors.evidence: preview-session-manager.win32.test.ts Guard 2a — RED on pre-fix main (bare npm, no wrapper) -> GREEN after e931d25. Real mgr.spawn() through the injected spawn seam under a stubbed win32 platform with a planted npm.cmd on PATH.

behaviors.behavior: AC1/F31 (LOW) — on win32, dev_server.command 'C:\tools\node.exe server.js' keeps its backslashes in argv[0] (not mangled to 'C:toolsnode.exe' by POSIX backslash-escape); tokenizeCommand + spawn both preserve them
behaviors.evidence: preview-session-manager.win32.test.ts Guard 2b (2 tests: spawn argv + tokenizeCommand) — RED on pre-fix main (shell-quote POSIX escape mangles it) -> GREEN after e931d25.

behaviors.behavior: AC2/AC5 Guard 1 — injection security fence: '& calc.exe', '; rm -rf /', backticks, '$(reboot)', '| whoami' are NEVER shell-interpreted; the manager either refuses (throws, no spawn) or spawns discrete non-interpolated shell-less argv (no single arg fuses the whole command, no whitespace-fused operator, no bare separator token)
behaviors.evidence: preview-session-manager.win32.test.ts Guard 1 — permanent fence, GREEN on both win32 and linux (2 platforms x 5 payloads = 10 cases). No payload ever reaches a real child_process.

behaviors.behavior: AC3 POSIX pin — tokenizeCommand + spawn shape are byte-identical on linux/darwin (POSIX backslash-escape stays correct: 'C:\tools\node.exe'->['C:toolsnode.exe',...]; 'npm run dev'->['npm','run','dev'] with shell:false); the win32 branch does not regress the non-Windows path
behaviors.evidence: preview-session-manager.win32.test.ts Guard 2c — GREEN throughout (2 POSIX platforms tokenize + 1 linux spawn-shape).

behaviors.behavior: Security HIGH (cwd-before-PATH hijack) — a BARE command resolves via PATH ONLY, never the untrusted previewed-project cwd (a planted <cwd>\npm.cmd in a hostile repo can never win); a path-like command still resolves cwd-relative (fix does not over-reach)
behaviors.evidence: preview-win32-resolve.test.ts Guard 3 — RED->GREEN. Two shims planted (cwd bait + legit PATH); resolveSpawn returns the PATH shim, not the cwd bait.

behaviors.behavior: Security HIGH (spaced-shim under cmd /s) — a resolved '.cmd' shim whose path contains a space (e.g. Program Files\nodejs\npm.cmd) is emitted as the canonical verbatim outer-quoted line cmd /d /s /c ""<quoted-shim>" run dev" with windowsVerbatimArguments:true (outer pair strips under /s, inner shim-path quotes survive), shell:false
behaviors.evidence: preview-win32-resolve.test.ts Guard 4 — exact argv pinned (args.length===4, args[3]===`""<shim>" run dev"`, windowsVerbatimArguments===true). RED->GREEN after 0789af0.

behaviors.behavior: Security MEDIUM (% var-expansion) — win32 REFUSES a command containing %...% ('%COMSPEC% run dev', 'npm run %CD%') with PreviewProfileInvalidError; never spawns
behaviors.evidence: preview-win32-resolve.test.ts Guard 5 — 2 payloads, both throw before any spawn. RED->GREEN.

behaviors.behavior: Security HIGH (bare-absent throw) — a BARE command ABSENT from PATH THROWS (command-not-found), never falls through to 'cmd /d /s /c <bare>' where cmd's cwd-first resolution would run a planted <cwd>\npm.cmd; a bare command ON PATH still resolves; a path-like absent command still wraps as today (no throw)
behaviors.evidence: preview-win32-resolve.test.ts Guard 6 — RED on 0789af0 (cwd-first cmd delegation) -> GREEN after 1af7b47. 3 tests (absent-throw, on-PATH-resolves, path-like-absent-wraps).

behaviors.behavior: AC3 no-regression — the full existing server suite stays green; no invariant/ADR regressed (ADR-044 shell:false posture, C-07 injection safety, POSIX tokenization all intact)
behaviors.evidence: server vitest 1871/1871 green (F0, SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local). Client unaffected: zero client/** files changed.

behaviors.behavior: AC4 footprint / bloat baseline — the win32 logic went to a NEW cohesive module preview-win32-spawn.ts (204 LOC, narrow resolveSpawn interface) and 2 new test files, because preview-session-manager.ts is AT its 393 baseline and preview-session-manager.test.ts is AT its 341 baseline; shipwright_bloat_baseline.json NOT ratcheted
behaviors.evidence: git diff origin/main..HEAD = 5 files (preview-session-manager.ts +23/-37 net-negative; preview-session-manager.test.ts +14/-; new preview-win32-spawn.ts 204; new preview-session-manager.win32.test.ts 245; new preview-win32-resolve.test.ts 244). Baseline unchanged (no anti-ratchet violation).

test_completeness.note: 5 spec ACs (AC1 fix behavior + no-repro; AC2 RED-first regression test; AC3 suites green; AC4 footprint/no-ratchet; AC5 MAX gates) map onto 10 enumerated behaviors: AC1->F03(Guard 2a)+F31(Guard 2b); AC2/AC5->Guard 1 fence + the 4 security guards (3/4/5/6, all RED->GREEN); AC3->POSIX pin (Guard 2c) + full-suite no-regression; AC4->new-cohesive-module footprint + bloat-baseline-not-ratcheted. All testable, all tested; untested_testable=0. The spaced-Program-Files path (Guard 4) is stub-exercised only because this host's Node is at a spaceless WinGet path — the real-app confirmation is the post-merge :3847 Preview smoke (Guard 4 real-stack).
